name_en: L⊚℮w℮ New 🆕 Small Glossy Calfskin Puzzle Fold Tote featuring iconic geometric lines of the signature bag, reimagined through graphic and architectural panels to make the bag completely fold flat. Adorned with understated L⊚℮w℮ logo, can be worn over the shoulder or carried by hand. Suede lining with L⊚℮w℮ gold stamping.
